\tzpentry{ID5708}{Quantum Coupling Constant Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5708 introduces Quantum Coupling Constant Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \alpha^{-1} = \frac{\lambda_C}{r_{\text{classical}}} = \frac{\hbar/(m_e c)}{e^2/(4\pi\epsilon_0 m_e c^2)} = \frac{4\pi\epsilon_0\hbar c}{e^2} \]
